name: VirtualSMS
description: SMS verification API with real SIM-backed numbers for AI agents. Buy numbers, fetch OTPs, check balance via REST or MCP. 145+ countries, 2,500+ services, x402 stablecoin payments.

skills.name: Number Purchase
skills.description: Buy real SIM-backed phone numbers from 145+ countries for specific services — WhatsApp, Telegram, banking, or any of 2,500+ platforms.

skills.name: OTP Retrieval
skills.description: Fetch incoming SMS verification codes in real time; balance is auto-refunded if no code arrives within the delivery window.

skills.name: x402 Stablecoin Top-Up
skills.description: Top up agent balance via x402 stablecoin on Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, or Optimism — crypto-native payments, no credit card.
